base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of big_mario_fireball_throw_partial — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Partial-overlay sprite — top 24 px replaces current sprite's top while bottom 8 px stays. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Partial-overlay sprite — top 24 px replaces current sprite's top while bottom 8 px stays; used when throwing fireball mid-movement (walking/skidding/jumping-L-R). When standing still or jumping-up, the full-body throw sprite is used instead
